title: GenAI Gateway: LLM Prompt Injection Detected (AML.T0051)
description: Detects prompt-injection attempts at the GenAI/LLM inference gateway. Fires when the gateway guardrail classifies a request as prompt injection or sets the injection flag, ranking the offending caller identity, API key, source IP, and targeted model. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0051 (LLM Prompt Injection).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC GenAI Gateway Logs' and ('Guardrail Category' = 'prompt_injection' or 'Injection Detected' = 'true') | stats count as Hits, distinctcount('GenAI Model') as Models, max('Prompt Risk Score') as MaxRisk by 'GenAI Identity', 'API Key ID', 'Client IP' | sort -Hits
falsepositives: Guardrail regression tests submitting known injection corpora
